/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tool.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tool.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tool.dir/src/PrecisionPropagator.cpp.o -o tool  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/llvm-21/lib /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangTooling.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangBasic.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangASTMatchers.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangRewrite.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangFormat.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangToolingInclusions.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangFrontend.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangDriver.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangParse.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangSerialization.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangSema.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangAPINotes.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangEdit.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangAnalysis.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangASTMatchers.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangAST.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangToolingCore.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangRewrite.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangLex.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libclangBasic.a /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libLLVM.so.1
